completion_summary: Completed the admitted opt-in graph-neighborhood context-pack integration slice. CAP-0009 adds default-off graph-neighborhood context candidates to build_latest_context_manifest while preserving existing default context-pack behavior and avoiding provider prompt, runtime manifest, retrieval, embedding, reranking, persisted graph, production index, memory-store, and automatic context inclusion changes.
constraints: Do not implement context-pack integration in this plan proposal.
Do not change runtime context selection.
Do not write persisted graph artifacts.
Do not add a graph database.
Do not change retrieval, embeddings, reranking, or production indexes.
Do not mutate memory stores or runtime manifests.
Do not enable automatic context inclusion.
Any implementation requires this plan to be admitted first.
expected_outputs: A proposed context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory.
Explicit integration boundaries and rollback constraints.
Success criteria requiring preservation of existing default context-pack behavior until admitted.
No runtime integration implementation in the proposal commit.
mitigation: Limit this step to self-model plan records, tests, and index updates. Require a separate admission warrant before any code path changes context-pack behavior.
next_action: Keep GAP-0002 open. The next governed slice should evaluate whether to expose the opt-in graph-neighborhood candidate path through scripts or provider-facing flags, still default-off, or gather evidence before any automatic context inclusion.
non_goals: Adding retrieval, embeddings, reranking, or index mutation.
objective: Create a repository-tracked evidence-only readiness decision artifact using CAP-0007. The artifact should decide whether the available CAP-0006/CAP-0007 evidence justifies proposing a separate context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory.
proposed_change: Create a governed plan for a narrowly scoped context-pack integration slice that can use graph-neighborhood readiness evidence to prepare future context selection behavior while preserving existing default context-pack behavior until separately admitted and implemented.
rationale: GAP-0002 remains open after PLAN-20260710-0002 completion.
DECISION-20260710-0001 records that the repository readiness evidence supports proposing a separate governed context-pack integration plan.
CAP-0008 provides a repository-tracked evidence-only readiness decision artifact.
The next step must be proposal and admission governance before any integration implementation.
risk: The main risk is accidentally implementing integration behavior during the proposal step. This plan must remain a governance proposal only until admitted.
scope: Produce a bounded repository artifact recording the readiness decision.
Record the evidence used for the decision.
Decide only whether a separate governed context-pack integration plan should be proposed.
Keep GAP-0002 open unless a separate future plan explicitly closes it.
success_criteria: The plan validates through the self-model schema.
The plan is indexed as proposed and open.
The plan explicitly cites DECISION-20260710-0001 and CAP-0008 as evidence.
The plan explicitly blocks implementation until a later admission warrant.
Self-model tests, full tests, and audit pass.
summary: Propose a separate governed context-pack integration plan for graph-local scoped memory. This proposal is the governance step after DECISION-20260710-0001 and CAP-0008; it does not implement integration or change runtime behavior.
title: Propose graph neighborhood context-pack integration plan
